question_text: What is the correct order of the planets in our Solar System, starting from the Sun?

options.label: A
options.text: Mercury, Venus, Earth, Mars, Jupiter, Saturn, Uranus, Neptune

options.label: B
options.text: Mercury, Mars, Venus, Earth, Jupiter, Saturn, Uranus, Neptune

options.label: C
options.text: Venus, Mercury, Earth, Mars, Jupiter, Saturn, Neptune, Uranus

options.label: D
options.text: Mercury, Venus, Mars, Earth, Jupiter, Saturn, Uranus, Neptune

explanation: The eight planets in order from the Sun are Mercury, Venus, Earth, Mars, Jupiter, Saturn, Uranus, and Neptune. A helpful mnemonic is 'My Very Educated Mother Just Served Us Noodles'.
